headline: U.S. Bancorp’s BTIG Deal Expands Capital Markets And Valuation Story
summary: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) has completed its acquisition of BTIG, LLC. The deal adds institutional equity sales, trading, and advisory capabilities to U.S. Bancorp's capital markets platform. BTIG will continue to operate as a separate broker dealer within U.S. Bancorp. For investors watching how large banks expand their fee driven businesses, this move gives U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) a broader set of institutional services. BTIG's institutional equity and advisory operations sit alongside U.S...
